message.content:
### 1. Profile Header  
- **Avatar**: Circular profile picture of a person holding a red/white wrapped food item (likely a burger) in a room with a wall, light switch, and framed decor.  
- **Name**: "Johnnyyy shanny" (display name, bold white text).  
- **Username**: "nonshas20" (gray text below the name).  
- **Bio**: "a bit of everythinng - vibe coding specialist" (white text, casual tone).  
- **Location**: Not visible.  
- **Links**: No visible social links (e.g., Twitter, website) in the header.  
- **Followers/Following**: Not visible in the header.  
- **Edit Profile Button**: Dark gray button with white text "Edit profile" at the bottom of the header section.  


### 2. Pinned Repositories (Labeled "Popular repositories")  
Four repositories are displayed in a 2x2 grid, each with:  
- **Repo Name**: Blue text (clickable link).  
- **Visibility**: "Public" badge (gray text in a rounded rectangle).  
- **Language**: Blue circle icon + "TypeScript" (gray text) for all repos.  
- **Stars/Forks**: Not visible (no star/fork counts shown).  

| Repo Name       | Description (Not Visible) | Language   | Stars | Forks |  
|-----------------|---------------------------|------------|-------|-------|  
| slimeatory      | —                         | TypeScript | —     | —     |  
| fieldnotes      | —                         | TypeScript | —     | —     |  
| pubgclone       | —                         | TypeScript | —     | —     |  
| jsrportfolio    | —                         | TypeScript | —     | —     |  


### 3. Contribution Graph / Activity  
- **Title**: "270 contributions in the last year" (white text).  
- **Graph**: A heatmap showing contributions by day of the week (Mon, Wed, Fri) and month (Jul–Jun). Green squares indicate contributions, with intensity varying (darker green = more contributions).  
- **Legend**: "Less" (dark green) → "More" (bright green) at the bottom right.  
- **Link**: "Learn how we count contributions" (gray text, under the graph).  
- **Settings**: "Contribution settings" (gray text with a dropdown arrow) at the top right of the graph.  


### 4. Stats, Achievements, or Badges  
- **Contribution Count**: "270 contributions in the last year" (displayed above the graph).  
- **Badges/Achievements**: Not visible (no profile badges or achievement icons).  


### 5. Layout Structure  
- **Sidebar (Left)**: Contains the avatar, name, username, bio, and "Edit profile" button.  
- **Main Content (Right)**: Contains the "Popular repositories" section (2x2 grid) and "Contribution activity" section (graph + settings).  
- **Color Scheme**: Dark theme (black background, white/gray text, blue links).  


### Exact Details for Recreation  
- Repo names: `slimeatory`, `fieldnotes`, `pubgclone`, `jsrportfolio` (all public, TypeScript).  
- Contribution count: 270 (last year).  
- Bio: "a bit of everythinng - vibe coding specialist".  
- Username: `nonshas20`.  
- Display name: `Johnnyyy shanny`.  
- Graph months: Jul, Aug, Sep, Oct, Nov, Dec, Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun.  
- Days of the week: Mon, Wed, Fri (displayed vertically on the left of the graph).
